top_signals.title: F*** f*** f***: Tennis star Moutet  fined £4k per F-bomb for Queen’s Club outburst on BBC
top_signals.summary: French tennis player Corentin Moutet has been fined 90 per cent of his prize money – or £4,322 per swear word – for saying “f***” seven times in a post-match interview at Queen’s Club. Moutet turned the air blue during the BBC’s live coverage of the HSBC Championships when interviewed on court by Jenny Drummond [...]
